package.name: vehicle_wbt_smartcar_bridge
package.description:
ROS2 service bridge that exposes the official Baidu SmartCar 2026 MyCar API surface (car_wrap_2026.py) as ROS2 primitives. Runs on the Jetson side; wraps existing rclcpp nodes (mecanum_chassis_node, arm_node) instead of duplicating hardware control.
Topic namespace: /vehicle_wbt/v1/cmd/... (services) and /vehicle_wbt/v1/state/... (state topics).
The perception/lane/OCR/NLP backends live on the dev box (subscribe to /vehicle_wbt/v1/sensors/camera/*/image_compressed, run inference there, send motion commands back via these services). This matches the user's intent: robot side = dumb hardware layer, dev side = smart perception/planning/control.
